creator: setantae@submonkey.net
text:
> If you like the patch, submit it, dont like it? comment on it. :-) Comments below, as requested. > ! tree. The complete list of people with commit ``privileges'' can be As someone else pointed out, priviliges isn't slang or an abbreviation. Best to lose the quotes altogether I feel. > !

The general public does not have commit privilges, but they write and > ! submit documentation nonetheless. Once the documenation has been ``The general public'' is either singular, or it's plural. Not both. You have also spelt documentation incorrectly. Time to install ispell ? ;) > ! submitted according to the procedure layed out on the s/layed/laid/ > ! be noticed by one of the committers and will be reviewed & committed. What's wrong with ``and'' instead of ``&'' ? Ceri -- keep a mild groove on
